testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: The following asserts failed: expected [https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html] but found [https://www.saucedemo.com/]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: expected [https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html] but found [https://www.saucedemo.com/] at loginstep.loginstepdefination.verify(loginstepdefination.java:45) at ✽.inventory page should display with url "https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html"(file:///C:/Users/koush/eclipse-workspace/PageObjectModel6/features/login.feature:7) ...
